_comment: Underdog contest-variant payout multipliers. Keys are bet sizes (string-encoded ints). For 'flex' and 'insurance', each value is a list indexed by miss-count (0 misses first). Power/rivals are single payouts at full-hit. Insurance contests only exist at sizes 5 and 6. Numbers reflect the public Underdog terms current as of 2026-05; tune via calibration audits and update in place.
